highlights.title: AZW3 and MOBI support
highlights.description: If your books come from the Kindle ecosystem, you can now import AZW3 or MOBI files like EPUB while keeping covers, chapters, and reading progress.

highlights.title: Large libraries feel lighter
highlights.description: Local article catalogs now load in pages, while ebook pagination, PDF text indexing, and assistant diagnostics do less work up front.

highlights.title: Clearer data management
highlights.description: When you need backup, restore, data paths, or log cleanup, Settings now groups paths, log retention, and database actions in a clearer place.

highlights.title: Safer import boundaries
highlights.description: Web import blocks localhost and private networks by default and limits oversized web and ebook content to avoid saving unintended private resources.

highlights.title: More stable reader details
highlights.description: Search responsiveness, annotation layout after window resizing, PDF author titles, update-check feedback, and Kindle annotation location are steadier.
